description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a simple rectangular footprint and a prominent gable roof. The front facade features a central entrance with a small set of steps leading up to a covered porch area, flanked by two windows. The side elevations show a series of evenly spaced windows, while the rear is more minimal with fewer openings. The roof is moderately pitched and extends beyond the walls, providing some overhang for weather protection. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely painted plaster or siding, with darker accents around the base and window frames. The structure sits on a flat, grassy plot with signage or display boards positioned nearby.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, central entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement, finished in light colors with dark accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, covered porch, and two front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, three side windows, and display boards on the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a clear view of the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, three windows, and signage near the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows, evenly spaced side windows
